rule_metadata.author: Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Suspicious Fsutil Execution Allowing Remote Connections

rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Fsutil Execution Allowing Remote Connections
id: 27e58290-85bf-4bd4-8eab-1c493139b659
status: experimental
description: Detects the use of fsutil to permit additional types of symbolic links
  on a computer. These can be used to enable ransomware to follow shortcusts to find
  all files it wants to encrypt.
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
- https://www.cybereason.com/blog/cybereason-vs.-blackcat-ransomware
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/12/05
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1547
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \fsutil.exe
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - behavior
    - set
    - SymlinkEvaluation
    CommandLine|re: ^.*(R|L)2(R|L):1.*$
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: high
